rationale: Observation base_record_id entity_mta-nyct is the closest canonical match: same entity_name ('New York City Transit' vs 'MTA New York City Transit'), same entity_type ('agency'), same acronym ('NYCT'). The registry record already captures this entity. Per rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new.
